description: Configure the DHIS2 instance branding for the Sierra Leone Ministry of Health and Sanitation (admin/district). Set the Application Title to 'Sierra Leone HMIS', the Application Introduction to 'Welcome to the Sierra Leone Health Information Management System. This platform is managed by the Ministry of Health and Sanitation for authorized health personnel only.', the Application Notification to 'System maintenance is scheduled for the last Sunday of each month from 22:00 to 02:00 GMT.', the Max number of analytics records to 100000, and the Application Footer to '© 2024 Ministry of Health and Sanitation, Sierra Leone'.

metadata.target_intro: Welcome to the Sierra Leone Health Information Management System. This platform is managed by the Ministry of Health and Sanitation for authorized health personnel only.
metadata.target_notification: System maintenance is scheduled for the last Sunday of each month from 22:00 to 02:00 GMT.
metadata.target_footer: © 2024 Ministry of Health and Sanitation, Sierra Leone
